sections.section: Page 8 Activity 1: A Family in the Café

tree.text: A Family in the Café Dialogue
tree.notes: 学习关于家庭成员、颜色以及朋友的词汇。
tree.statement: Jim 看到咖啡馆里有一个家庭。
tree.explanation: 第一句中 Jim 说道：Look, Jenny, a family! A family in the café.

children.text: Look, Jenny, a family! A family in the café.
children.cn: 看，珍妮，一个家庭！咖啡馆里的一个家庭。
children.notes: family (家庭), cafe (咖啡馆)。
children.statement: Jenny 率先看到了那个家庭。
children.explanation: 是 Jim 看到并让 Jenny 看的。

children.text: Yes, a man. A man with a book. What colour's the book?
children.cn: 是的，一个男人。一个拿着书的男人。书是什么颜色的？
children.notes: with a book 意为“拿着书”；What colour 询问颜色。
children.explanation: A man with a book 表示男人拿着一本书。

children.text: Yellow... and a woman... with a boy. Yes, a boy with a boat.
children.cn: 黄色的……还有一个女人……带着一个男孩。是的，一个拿着小船的男孩。
children.notes: Yellow 表示书是黄色的；woman (女人)，boat (小船)。
children.statement: 那个男孩有一艘绿色的小船。
children.explanation: 文中 Jim 之后提到 boat 是 Green。

children.text: And a girl... with crayons. You're a girl, Jenny.
children.cn: 还有一个女孩……拿着蜡笔。你是一个女孩，珍妮。
children.notes: crayons 意为“蜡笔”（复数）。
children.explanation: Jim 说道 You're a girl, Jenny.

children.text: And you're a boy, Jim. New friends! Great!
children.cn: 你是个男孩，吉姆。新朋友！太棒了！
children.notes: new friends 意为“新朋友”；great 意为“太棒了”。
children.explanation: Jenny 说道 you're a boy, Jim (吉姆，你是个男孩)。

tree.notes: 学习自我介绍以及询问年龄的表达。
tree.statement: Jenny 和 Jim 是双胞胎。
tree.explanation: 对话末尾 Jenny and Jim 说道 We're twins! (我们是双胞胎！)。

children.text: Hello. I'm Jenny. What's your name?
children.cn: 你好。我是珍妮。你叫什么名字？
children.notes: 询问姓名用 What's your name?
children.statement: Jenny 正在向新朋友介绍自己并询问姓名。
children.explanation: Jenny 说 Hello. I'm Jenny. What's your name?。

children.text: Anna. My name's Anna. What's your name?
children.cn: 安娜。我的名字是安娜。你叫什么名字？
children.notes: 介绍自己的名字用 My name's...
children.explanation: 安娜回答说 Anna. My name's Anna. What's your name?。

children.text: I'm Jim. How old are you?
children.notes: How old are you? 询问年龄。
children.statement: 吉姆在询问安娜的年龄。
children.explanation: Jim 说 How old are you?。

children.text: I'm six. How old are you?
children.notes: 安娜六岁，并反问吉姆和珍妮的年龄。
children.explanation: 安娜说 I'm six. How old are you?。

children.text: Hello. My name's Matt, and I'm four. How old are you, Jim?
children.cn: 你好。我的名字是马特，我四岁了。你多大了，吉姆？
children.notes: 马特自我介绍并询问吉姆的年龄。
children.explanation: 马特说 I'm four (我四岁)。

children.text: Er... I'm five.
children.notes: Jenny 回答说她五岁。
children.explanation: Jenny 说 Er... I'm five.。

children.text: and I'm five too.
children.notes: too 表示“也”。
children.explanation: 他说 and I'm five too.。

children.text: We're twins!
children.notes: twins 双胞胎。
children.explanation: Jenny and Jim 说 We're twins!。

sections.section: Pages 12 and 13 Activity 1: Home Time Story

tree.notes: 学校放学时，孩子们向家长介绍新朋友和家人。
tree.explanation: May 介绍 Ben 说是她的 new friend。

children.text: Boys and girls! Sit down, please. Five ... four... three.....
children.cn: 男孩和女孩们！请坐下。五……四……三……
children.notes: boys and girls (孩子们)；sit down (坐下)。
children.statement: 老师正在让学生们坐下。
children.explanation: 老师说 Sit down, please.

children.text: Come on, Ben. Sit down with me.
children.notes: come on (快点)；with me (和我一起)。
children.statement: May 邀请 Ben 和她一起坐。
children.explanation: May 说 Sit down with me.。

children.text: OK, May.
children.notes: OK 表示同意。
children.statement: Ben 拒绝了 May 的邀请。
children.explanation: Ben 说 OK, May.，表示同意。

children.text: two... one!
children.notes: 老师倒数结束。
children.explanation: 老师只数到了 one 结束。

children.text: Hooray!
children.notes: hooray (万岁) 表示欢呼。
children.statement: 孩子们在倒数结束后欢呼。
children.explanation: 孩子们欢呼 Hooray!。

children.text: My family!
children.notes: family (家庭，家人)。
children.explanation: May 看到家人后高兴地喊 My family!。

children.text: Mum, this is my new friend.
children.notes: this is... 用于介绍他人；new friend (新朋友)。
children.statement: May 正在向妈妈介绍本。
children.explanation: May 说 Mum, this is my new friend.。

children.text: What's your name?
children.notes: What's your name? 询问姓名。
children.statement: 妈妈在询问新朋友的名字。
children.explanation: 妈妈问 What's your name?。

children.text: My name's Ben.
children.notes: My name's... 介绍自己的名字。
children.explanation: 新朋友回答说 My name's Ben.。

children.text: How old are you, Ben?
children.notes: How old are you? 询问年龄。
children.explanation: 妈妈问 How old are you, Ben?。

children.text: I'm six.
children.notes: six (六)。
children.explanation: Ben 说 I'm six.。

children.text: I'm five.
children.notes: five (五)。
children.statement: May 岁数比 Ben 大。
children.explanation: Ben 六岁，May 五岁，May 岁数小。

children.text: This is Eva. She's two.
children.notes: She's two (她两岁)。
children.explanation: 妈妈介绍说 This is Eva. She's two.。

children.text: Hello, Eva.
children.notes: Hello 用于打招呼。
children.explanation: Ben 说 Hello, Eva.。

children.text: Who's that man? Is he your dad?
children.cn: 那个男人是谁？他是你爸爸吗？
children.notes: Who's that man? 询问那是谁；Is he your dad? 是一般疑问句。
children.statement: May 在问那个男人是不是本的爸爸。
children.explanation: May 问 Is he your dad?。

children.text: No, he isn't my dad. He's Tom's dad.
children.cn: 不，他不是我爸爸。他是汤姆的爸爸。
children.notes: No, he isn't. 表示否定回答。
children.explanation: Ben 回答说 No, he isn't my dad. He's Tom's dad.。

children.text: Who's that woman? Is she your mum?
children.cn: 那个女人是谁？她是你妈妈吗？
children.notes: woman (女人)；mum (妈妈)。
children.statement: May 在问那个女人是不是本的妈妈。
children.explanation: May 问 Is she your mum?。

children.text: No, she isn't my mum. She's Kim's mum.
children.cn: 不，她不是我妈妈。她是金的妈妈。
children.notes: No, she isn't. 表示否定回答。
children.explanation: Ben 回答说 No, she isn't my mum. She's Kim's mum.。

children.text: Are you OK, Ben?
children.notes: Are you OK? 询问对方是否还好。
children.explanation: May 看到本的表情，关心地问 Are you OK, Ben?。

children.text: What about your mum and dad?
children.notes: What about... 询问……怎么样/在哪里。
children.statement: 妈妈在询问本的爸爸妈妈在哪里。
children.explanation: 妈妈问 What about your mum and dad?。

children.text: Um...
children.notes: Um 表示犹豫或思考。
children.statement: 本立刻回答了妈妈的问题。
children.explanation: Ben 面露犹豫，只发出了 Um... 的声音。

children.text: This is my mum. And that man is my dad. And that's my brother...
children.cn: 这是我的妈妈。那个男人是我的爸爸。那是我的哥哥/弟弟……
children.notes: Ben 看到家人来了，高兴地介绍。
children.statement: 本看到了他的妈妈、爸爸和兄弟。
children.explanation: Ben 介绍说 This is my mum. And that man is my dad...。

children.text: Great! Your family is here at school!
children.cn: 太棒了！你的家庭在学校这里！
children.notes: family (家庭，家人)；at school (在学校)。
children.statement: 本的家人没有来到学校。
children.explanation: May 欢呼说 Your family is here at school!。
